queries.question: List proprietary and established names from fda_510k_device_submission where indications for use is one of Same as Intended Use, Same as intended use, Same as Intended Use., Same as intended use., and 8 more.
queries.sql:
SELECT "proprietary_and_established_names" FROM "fda_510k_device_submission" WHERE "indications_for_use" IN ('Same as Intended Use', 'Same as intended use', 'Same as Intended Use.', 'Same as intended use.', 'Same as Intended use', 'Same as Intended Use(s) above', 'Same as the Intended Use.', 'Same as the Intended Use', 'Same as Intended Uses', 'The Sysmex XN-L analyzer is a quantitative multi-parameter automated hematology 
analyzer intended for in vitro diagnostic use in screening patient populations found in 
clinical laboratories. The XN-L analyzer classifies and enumerates the following 
parameters in venous and capillary whole blood: WBC, RBC, HGB, HCT, MCV, MCH, 
MCHC, PLT, NEUT%/#, LYMPH%/#, MONO%/#, EO%/#, BASO%/#, IG%/#, RDW-
CV, RDW-SD, MPV, RET%/#, IRF, RET-He and has a Body Fluid mode for body 
fluids. The Body Fluid mode enumerates the WBC-BF, RBC-BF, MN%/#, PMN%/#, and 
TC-BF# parameters in cerebrospinal, peritoneal, pleural, and synovial fluids. Whole 
blood should be collected in K2 or K3EDTA anticoagulant and peritoneal, pleural, and 
synovial fluids in K2EDTA anticoagulant to prevent clotting of fluid. The use of 
anticoagulants with CSF specimens is neither required nor recommended.', 'The Sysmex XN-L analyzer is a quantitative multi-parameter automated hematology 
analyzer intended for in vitro diagnostic use in screening patient populations found in 
clinical laboratories. The XN-L analyzer classifies and enumerates the following 
parameters in venous and capillary whole blood: WBC, RBC, HGB, HCT, MCV, 
MCH,MCHC, PLT, NEUT%/#, LYMPH%/#, MONO%/#, EO%/#, BASO%/#, IG%/#, 
RDW-CV, RDW-SD, MPV, RET%/#,IRF, RET-He and has a Body Fluid mode for body 
fluids. The Body Fluid mode enumerates the WBC-BF, RBC-BF, MN%/#, PMN%/#, and 
TC-BF# parameters in cerebrospinal, peritoneal, pleural, and synovial fluids. Whole 
blood should be collected in K2 or K3EDTA anticoagulant and peritoneal, pleural, and 
synovial fluids in K2EDTA anticoagulant to prevent clotting of fluid. The use of 
anticoagulants with CSF specimens is neither required nor recommended. 
The performance of this device has not been established in pediatric patients under the 
age of 2 years.', 'The StatStrip Glucose Hospital Meter System is intended for point-of-care, in vitro diagnostic, multiple-patient use for the quantitative determination of glucose in capillary finger stick, venous whole blood, arterial whole blood, neonate arterial whole blood and neonate heel stick specimens throughout all hospital and all professional healthcare settings including patients receiving intensive medical intervention/therapy. The system should only be used with single-use, auto-disabling lancing devices when performing a capillary finger stick or neonate heel stick.  It is not intended for use with neonate cord blood specimens.  It is not intended for the screening or diagnosis of diabetes mellitus but is indicated for use in determining dysglycemia.');

value:
The Sysmex XN-L analyzer is a quantitative multi-parameter automated hematology 
analyzer intended for in vitro diagnostic use in screening patient populations found in 
clinical laboratories. The XN-L analyzer classifies and enumerates the following 
parameters in venous and capillary whole blood: WBC, RBC, HGB, HCT, MCV, MCH, 
MCHC, PLT, NEUT%/#, LYMPH%/#, MONO%/#, EO%/#, BASO%/#, IG%/#, RDW-
CV, RDW-SD, MPV, RET%/#, IRF, RET-He and has a Body Fluid mode for body 
fluids. The Body Fluid mode enumerates the WBC-BF, RBC-BF, MN%/#, PMN%/#, and 
TC-BF# parameters in cerebrospinal, peritoneal, pleural, and synovial fluids. Whole 
blood should be collected in K2 or K3EDTA anticoagulant and peritoneal, pleural, and 
synovial fluids in K2EDTA anticoagulant to prevent clotting of fluid. The use of 
anticoagulants with CSF specimens is neither required nor recommended.

The Sysmex XN-L analyzer is a quantitative multi-parameter automated hematology 
analyzer intended for in vitro diagnostic use in screening patient populations found in 
clinical laboratories. The XN-L analyzer classifies and enumerates the following 
parameters in venous and capillary whole blood: WBC, RBC, HGB, HCT, MCV, 
MCH,MCHC, PLT, NEUT%/#, LYMPH%/#, MONO%/#, EO%/#, BASO%/#, IG%/#, 
RDW-CV, RDW-SD, MPV, RET%/#,IRF, RET-He and has a Body Fluid mode for body 
fluids. The Body Fluid mode enumerates the WBC-BF, RBC-BF, MN%/#, PMN%/#, and 
TC-BF# parameters in cerebrospinal, peritoneal, pleural, and synovial fluids. Whole 
blood should be collected in K2 or K3EDTA anticoagulant and peritoneal, pleural, and 
synovial fluids in K2EDTA anticoagulant to prevent clotting of fluid. The use of 
anticoagulants with CSF specimens is neither required nor recommended. 
The performance of this device has not been established in pediatric patients under the 
age of 2 years.

The StatStrip Glucose Hospital Meter System is intended for point-of-care, in vitro diagnostic, multiple-patient use for the quantitative determination of glucose in capillary finger stick, venous whole blood, arterial whole blood, neonate arterial whole blood and neonate heel stick specimens throughout all hospital and all professional healthcare settings including patients receiving intensive medical intervention/therapy. The system should only be used with single-use, auto-disabling lancing devices when performing a capillary finger stick or neonate heel stick.  It is not intended for use with neonate cord blood specimens.  It is not intended for the screening or diagnosis of diabetes mellitus but is indicated for use in determining dysglycemia.

queries.question: List proprietary and established names from fda_510k_device_submission where predicate device name is not one of Liofilchem MTS, vancomycin, HardyDisk Tigecycline 15µg, VITEK®2 AST-GN Doxycycline, Nova StatStrip Glucose Hospital Meter System, and 8 more.
queries.sql: SELECT "proprietary_and_established_names" FROM "fda_510k_device_submission" WHERE "predicate_device_name" NOT IN ('Liofilchem MTS, vancomycin', 'HardyDisk Tigecycline 15µg', 'VITEK®2 AST-GN Doxycycline', 'Nova StatStrip Glucose Hospital Meter System', 'Sysmex XN-Series (XN-10, XN-20) Automated Hematology Analyzer', 'cobas Cdiff Test for use on the cobas 4800 System', 'SpermCheck™ Fertility', 'Siemens ADVIA 1800 Chemistry System including ISE and Albumin BCP Assays', 'Sensititre Haemophilus/Streptococcus pneumoniae (HP) MIC Plates', 'Sensititre 20-24 hour Haemophilus influenzae/Streptococcus pneumoniae MIC or Breakpoint, Susceptibility System with Omadacycline in the dilution range of 0.008 - 32 ug/mL', 'STA-Liatest Free Protein S', 'SEEKER System');

value: Nova StatStrip Glucose Hospital Meter System
Sysmex XN-Series (XN-10, XN-20) Automated Hematology Analyzer
cobas Cdiff Test for use on the cobas 4800 System
Siemens ADVIA 1800 Chemistry System including ISE and Albumin BCP Assays
Sensititre 20-24 hour Haemophilus influenzae/Streptococcus pneumoniae MIC or Breakpoint, Susceptibility System with Omadacycline in the dilution range of 0.008 - 32 ug/mL

queries.question: List proprietary and established names from fda_510k_device_submission where measurand is not one of Procalcitonin (PCT), Capillary whole blood glucose from the fingertip, 1,5-Anhydroglucitol (1,5-AG), Nucleic acids from inactivated Chlamydia trachomatis and Neisseria gonorrhoeae (positive control) and from human epithelial cells (negative control)., and 8 more.
queries.sql: SELECT "proprietary_and_established_names" FROM "fda_510k_device_submission" WHERE "measurand" NOT IN ('Procalcitonin (PCT)', 'Capillary whole blood glucose from the fingertip', '1,5-Anhydroglucitol (1,5-AG)', 'Nucleic acids from inactivated Chlamydia trachomatis and Neisseria gonorrhoeae (positive control) and from human epithelial cells (negative control).', 'Propoxyphene', 'Plazomicin 30µg', 'Plasma glucose from central venous catheter blood draw', 'Penicillin 0.002-32 μg/mL', 'Opiates', 'Omadacycline in the dilution range of 0.008 – 32 µg/mL.', 'Omadacycline 0.002-32 μg/mL', 'Nucleic acid sequences of Bacillus anthracis pX01 and pX02 plasmids');

value: Capillary whole blood glucose from the fingertip
Nucleic acids from inactivated Chlamydia trachomatis and Neisseria gonorrhoeae (positive control) and from human epithelial cells (negative control).
Plasma glucose from central venous catheter blood draw
Omadacycline in the dilution range of 0.008 – 32 µg/mL.
Nucleic acid sequences of Bacillus anthracis pX01 and pX02 plasmids

queries.question: List proprietary and established names from fda_510k_device_submission where panel is one of Hematology (81), Microbiology (83), Clinical Chemistry (75), Immunology (82), and 12 more.
queries.sql: SELECT "proprietary_and_established_names" FROM "fda_510k_device_submission" WHERE "panel" IN ('Hematology (81)', 'Microbiology (83)', 'Clinical Chemistry (75)', 'Immunology (82)', '83 – Microbiology', '83 - Microbiology', 'Chemistry (75)', '83 Microbiology', '83, Microbiology', '83-Microbiology', '83: Microbiology', 'MI - Microbiology', 'Chemistry', 'Toxicology (91)', '83- Microbiology', 'Microbiology');
